title: HALOS Changelog
description: Machine-readable changelog organized by spec artifact

principles.description: Changelog for the HALOS Principles spec

provenance.description: Changelog for the HALOS Provenance spec

version.description: Version identifier (e.g. 1.0.0 for principles, 0.3 for provenance)

changes.description: Summary of changes in this version

breaking.description: Whether this version contains breaking changes from the previous version

supersededBy.description: Version that supersedes this one (if status is superseded)

proposals.description: Proposal IDs that produced this version

provenanceRecord.description: Path to the HALOS provenance record for this version change
